<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── Shared TypeScript Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // All types used across Svelte stores and components.
3: // Single source of truth — import from here, not from vanilla modules.
4: 
5: // ─── Re-exports from shared-types ────────────────────────────────────────────
6: // These types are shared between server and frontend. Import them here so
7: // frontend code can continue importing everything from "./types.js".
8: 
9: import type {
10: 	AgentInfo,
11: 	AskUserQuestion,
12: 	CommandInfo,
13: 	FileEntry,
14: 	ModelInfo,
15: 	ProviderInfo,
16: 	PtyInfo,
17: 	RelayMessage,
18: 	SessionInfo,
19: 	TodoItem,
20: 	TodoStatus,
21: 	UsageInfo,
22: } from "../shared-types.js";
23: 
24: export type {
25: 	AgentInfo,
26: 	AskUserQuestion,
27: 	CommandInfo,
28: 	FileEntry,
29: 	ModelInfo,
30: 	ProviderInfo,
31: 	PtyInfo,
32: 	RelayMessage,
33: 	SessionInfo,
34: 	TodoItem,
35: 	TodoStatus,
36: 	UsageInfo,
37: };
38: 
39: // ─── Derived type aliases ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
40: 
41: /** Cost breakdown for a model (derived from shared ModelInfo). */
42: export type ModelCost = NonNullable<ModelInfo["cost"]>;
43: 
44: // ─── File Browser Types (frontend extensions) ────────────────────────────────
45: 
46: /** FileEntry with recursive children — for tree views that embed child nodes. */
47: export interface FileTreeEntry extends FileEntry {
48: 	children?: FileTreeEntry[];
49: }
50: 
51: // ─── Chat Message Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
52: 
53: export type ChatMessage =
54: 	| UserMessage
55: 	| AssistantMessage
56: 	| ThinkingMessage
57: 	| ToolMessage
58: 	| ResultMessage
59: 	| SystemMessage;
60: 
61: export interface UserMessage {
62: 	type: "user";
63: 	uuid: string;
64: 	text: string;
65: 	images?: string[];
66: }
67: 
68: export interface AssistantMessage {
69: 	type: "assistant";
70: 	uuid: string;
71: 	rawText: string;
72: 	html: string;
73: 	finalized: boolean;
74: 	messageId?: string;
75: }
76: 
77: export interface ThinkingMessage {
78: 	type: "thinking";
79: 	uuid: string;
80: 	text: string;
81: 	duration?: number;
82: 	done: boolean;
83: }
84: 
85: export interface ToolMessage {
86: 	type: "tool";
87: 	uuid: string;
88: 	id: string;
89: 	name: string;
90: 	status: "pending" | "running" | "completed" | "error";
91: 	result?: string;
92: 	isError?: boolean;
93: 	isTruncated?: boolean;
94: 	fullContentLength?: number;
95: 	messageId?: string;
96: }
97: 
98: export interface ResultMessage {
99: 	type: "result";
100: 	uuid: string;
101: 	cost?: number;
102: 	duration?: number;
103: 	inputTokens?: number;
104: 	outputTokens?: number;
105: 	cacheRead?: number;
106: 	cacheWrite?: number;
107: }
108: 
109: export interface SystemMessage {
110: 	type: "system";
111: 	uuid: string;
112: 	text: string;
113: 	variant?: "info" | "error";
114: }
115: 
116: // ─── Session Types (frontend-only) ──────────────────────────────────────────
117: 
118: export interface DateGroups {
119: 	today: SessionInfo[];
120: 	yesterday: SessionInfo[];
121: 	older: SessionInfo[];
122: }
123: 
124: // ─── Terminal Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
125: 
126: export interface TerminalAdapter {
127: 	mount(container: HTMLElement): void;
128: 	write(data: string): void;
129: 	onData(cb: (data: string) => void): void;
130: 	onResize(cb: (size: { cols: number; rows: number }) => void): void;
131: 	resize(): { cols: number; rows: number };
132: 	focus(): void;
133: 	dispose(): void;
134: 	readonly cols: number;
135: 	readonly rows: number;
136: }
137: 
138: export interface TabEntry {
139: 	ptyId: string;
140: 	title: string;
141: 	exited: boolean;
142: }
143: 
144: // ─── Discovery Types (frontend-only) ────────────────────────────────────────
145: 
146: export interface ProviderGroup {
147: 	provider: ProviderInfo;
148: 	models: ModelInfo[];
149: }
150: 
151: // ─── File Browser Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
152: 
153: export interface BreadcrumbSegment {
154: 	label: string;
155: 	path: string;
156: }
157: 
158: // ─── Permission Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
159: 
160: export interface PermissionRequest {
161: 	requestId: string;
162: 	toolName: string;
163: 	toolInput?: Record<string, unknown>;
164: 	toolUseId?: string;
165: }
166: 
167: // ─── Question Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
168: 
169: export interface QuestionRequest {
170: 	toolId: string;
171: 	questions: AskUserQuestion[];
172: }
173: 
174: // ─── History Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
175: 
176: export interface HistoryMessagePart {
177: 	id: string;
178: 	type: string;
179: 	/** Text content — matches OpenCode's TextPart schema (field is "text", not "content"). */
180: 	text?: string;
181: 	[key: string]: unknown;
182: }
183: 
184: export interface HistoryMessage {
185: 	id: string;
186: 	role: "user" | "assistant";
187: 	parts?: HistoryMessagePart[];
188: 	time?: { created?: number; completed?: number };
189: }
190: 
191: export interface Turn {
192: 	user?: HistoryMessage;
193: 	assistant?: HistoryMessage;
194: }
195: 
196: // ─── Toast Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
197: 
198: export interface Toast {
199: 	id: string;
200: 	message: string;
201: 	variant: "default" | "warn";
202: 	duration: number;
203: }
204: 
205: // ─── Banner Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
206: 
207: export interface BannerConfig {
208: 	id: string;
209: 	variant: "update" | "onboarding" | "skip-permissions" | "warning";
210: 	icon: string;
211: 	text: string;
212: 	dismissible: boolean;
213: 	version?: string;
214: }
215: 
216: // ─── Info Panel Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
217: 
218: export type PanelId = "usage-panel" | "status-panel" | "context-panel";
219: 
220: export interface UsageData {
221: 	cost?: number;
222: 	inputTokens?: number;
223: 	outputTokens?: number;
224: 	cacheRead?: number;
225: 	cacheWrite?: number;
226: 	turns?: number;
227: }
228: 
229: export interface StatusData {
230: 	pid?: number;
231: 	uptime?: number;
232: 	memory?: number;
233: 	activeSessions?: number;
234: 	processingSessions?: number;
235: 	clients?: number;
236: 	terminals?: number;
237: }
238: 
239: export interface ContextData {
240: 	usedTokens?: number;
241: 	windowSize?: number;
242: 	maxOutput?: number;
243: 	model?: string;
244: 	cost?: number;
245: 	turns?: number;
246: }
247: 
248: // ─── Notification Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
249: 
250: export interface NotifSettings {
251: 	push: boolean;
252: 	browser: boolean;
253: 	sound: boolean;
254: }
255: 
256: // ─── Todo Types (frontend-only) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
257: 
258: export interface TodoProgress {
259: 	completed: number;
260: 	total: number;
261: 	percentage: number;
262: }
263: 
264: // ─── Diff Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
265: 
266: export interface DiffOp {
267: 	type: "add" | "remove" | "equal";
268: 	line: string;
269: 	oldLineNo?: number;
270: 	newLineNo?: number;
271: }
272: 
273: export interface SplitRow {
274: 	type: "add" | "remove" | "equal" | "change";
275: 	oldLineNo: number | null;
276: 	oldLine: string | null;
277: 	newLineNo: number | null;
278: 	newLine: string | null;
279: }
280: 
281: // ─── File History Types ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
282: 
283: export interface FileVersion {
284: 	id: string;
285: 	path: string;
286: 	content: string;
287: 	timestamp: number;
288: 	source: "edit" | "write" | "external";
289: 	toolName?: string;
290: 	description?: string;
291: }
292: 
293: // ─── Project Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
294: 
295: export interface ProjectInfo {
296: 	slug: string;
297: 	title: string;
298: 	directory: string;
299: 	clientCount?: number;
300: }
301: 
302: // ─── Paste Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
303: 
304: export interface PendingImage {
305: 	id: string;
306: 	dataUrl: string;
307: 	name: string;
308: 	size: number;
309: }
310: 
311: // ─── Plan Mode Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
312: 
313: export interface PlanApproval {
314: 	onApprove: () => void;
315: 	onReject: () => void;
316: }
317: 
318: // ─── Connection Status ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
319: 
320: export type ConnectionStatus =
321: 	| "connected"
322: 	| "processing"
323: 	| "error"
324: 	| "disconnected"
325: 	| "";

(End of file - total 325 lines)
</content>

<path>/Users/dstern/src/personal/opencode-relay/opencode-relay/.worktrees/ticket-6.2/src/lib/public/stores/chat.svelte.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── Chat Store ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Manages chat messages, streaming state, and processing.
3: 
4: import type {
5: 	AssistantMessage,
6: 	ChatMessage,
7: 	RelayMessage,
8: 	ResultMessage,
9: 	SystemMessage,
10: 	ThinkingMessage,
11: 	ToolMessage,
12: 	UserMessage,
13: } from "../types.js";
14: import { generateUuid } from "../utils/format.js";
15: import { renderMarkdown } from "../utils/markdown.js";
16: 
17: // ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
18: 
19: export const chatState = $state({
20: 	messages: [] as ChatMessage[],
21: 	/** Raw text of the currently streaming assistant message. */
22: 	currentAssistantText: "",
23: 	/** Whether the LLM is currently generating. */
24: 	processing: false,
25: 	/** Tracks whether we're mid-stream (assistant message not yet finalized). */
26: 	streaming: false,
27: 	/** True during event replay (session switch). Suppresses streaming animations. */
28: 	replaying: false,
29: });
30: 
31: // ─── Derived getters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
32: 
33: /** Get the number of messages in current conversation. */
34: export function getMessageCount(): number {
35: 	return chatState.messages.length;
36: }
37: 
38: // ─── Internal state (not reactive — used for debouncing) ────────────────────
39: 
40: let renderTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;
41: let thinkingStartTime = 0;
42: 
43: /** Map tool IDs to their message UUIDs for updates. */
44: const toolUuidMap = new Map<string, string>();
45: 
46: // ─── Message handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
47: 
48: export function handleDelta(
49: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "delta" }>,
50: ): void {
51: 	const { text, messageId } = msg;
52: 
53: 	// If no current assistant message, create one
54: 	if (!chatState.streaming) {
55: 		const uuid = generateUuid();
56: 		const assistantMsg: AssistantMessage = {
57: 			type: "assistant",
58: 			uuid,
59: 			rawText: "",
60: 			html: "",
61: 			finalized: false,
62: 			messageId,
63: 		};
64: 		chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, assistantMsg];
65: 		chatState.streaming = true;
66: 		chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	chatState.currentAssistantText += text;
70: 
71: 	// Debounced markdown render (80ms)
72: 	if (renderTimer !== null) clearTimeout(renderTimer);
73: 	renderTimer = setTimeout(() => {
74: 		renderTimer = null;
75: 		flushAssistantRender();
76: 	}, 80);
77: }
78: 
79: export function handleThinkingStart(
80: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_start" }>,
81: ): void {
82: 	thinkingStartTime = Date.now();
83: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
84: 	const thinkingMsg: ThinkingMessage = {
85: 		type: "thinking",
86: 		uuid,
87: 		text: "",
88: 		done: false,
89: 	};
90: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, thinkingMsg];
91: }
92: 
93: export function handleThinkingDelta(
94: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_delta" }>,
95: ): void {
96: 	const { text } = msg;
97: 
98: 	// Find the last thinking message and append
99: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
100: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
101: 		const m = messages[i]!;
102: 		if (m.type === "thinking" && !(m as ThinkingMessage).done) {
103: 			messages[i] = {
104: 				...(m as ThinkingMessage),
105: 				text: (m as ThinkingMessage).text + text,
106: 			};
107: 			chatState.messages = messages;
108: 			return;
109: 		}
110: 	}
111: }
112: 
113: export function handleThinkingStop(
114: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_stop" }>,
115: ): void {
116: 	const duration = thinkingStartTime > 0 ? Date.now() - thinkingStartTime : 0;
117: 	thinkingStartTime = 0;
118: 
119: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
120: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
121: 		const m = messages[i]!;
122: 		if (m.type === "thinking" && !(m as ThinkingMessage).done) {
123: 			messages[i] = {
124: 				...(m as ThinkingMessage),
125: 				done: true,
126: 				duration,
127: 			};
128: 			chatState.messages = messages;
129: 			return;
130: 		}
131: 	}
132: }
133: 
134: export function handleToolStart(
135: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_start" }>,
136: ): void {
137: 	const { id, name, messageId } = msg;
138: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
139: 
140: 	toolUuidMap.set(id, uuid);
141: 
142: 	const toolMsg: ToolMessage = {
143: 		type: "tool",
144: 		uuid,
145: 		id,
146: 		name: name || "unknown",
147: 		status: "pending",
148: 		messageId,
149: 	};
150: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, toolMsg];
151: }
152: 
153: export function handleToolExecuting(
154: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_executing" }>,
155: ): void {
156: 	const { id } = msg;
157: 	const uuid = toolUuidMap.get(id);
158: 	if (!uuid) return;
159: 
160: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
161: 	const idx = messages.findIndex((m) => m.type === "tool" && m.uuid === uuid);
162: 	if (idx >= 0) {
163: 		messages[idx] = { ...(messages[idx] as ToolMessage), status: "running" };
164: 		chatState.messages = messages;
165: 	}
166: }
167: 
168: export function handleToolResult(
169: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_result" }>,
170: ): void {
171: 	const { id, content, is_error } = msg;
172: 	const uuid = toolUuidMap.get(id);
173: 	if (!uuid) return;
174: 
175: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
176: 	const idx = messages.findIndex((m) => m.type === "tool" && m.uuid === uuid);
177: 	if (idx >= 0) {
178: 		messages[idx] = {
179: 			...(messages[idx] as ToolMessage),
180: 			status: is_error ? "error" : "completed",
181: 			result: content ?? undefined,
182: 			isError: is_error ?? false,
183: 			isTruncated: msg.isTruncated,
184: 			fullContentLength: msg.fullContentLength,
185: 		};
186: 		chatState.messages = messages;
187: 	}
188: }
189: 
190: export function handleResult(
191: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "result" }>,
192: ): void {
193: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
194: 	const { usage, cost, duration } = msg;
195: 	const resultMsg: ResultMessage = {
196: 		type: "result",
197: 		uuid,
198: 		cost,
199: 		duration,
200: 		inputTokens: usage?.input,
201: 		outputTokens: usage?.output,
202: 		cacheRead: usage?.cache_read,
203: 		cacheWrite: usage?.cache_creation,
204: 	};
205: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, resultMsg];
206: }
207: 
208: export function handleDone(
209: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "done" }>,
210: ): void {
211: 	// Flush any pending render
212: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
213: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
214: 		renderTimer = null;
215: 	}
216: 
217: 	// Finalize the assistant message
218: 	if (chatState.streaming) {
219: 		flushAssistantRender();
220: 		const messages = [...chatState.messages];
221: 		for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
222: 			const m = messages[i]!;
223: 			if (m.type === "assistant" && !(m as AssistantMessage).finalized) {
224: 				messages[i] = {
225: 					...(m as AssistantMessage),
226: 					finalized: true,
227: 				};
228: 				chatState.messages = messages;
229: 				break;
230: 			}
231: 		}
232: 	}
233: 
234: 	chatState.streaming = false;
235: 	chatState.processing = false;
236: 	chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
237: 	toolUuidMap.clear();
238: }
239: 
240: export function handleStatus(
241: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "status" }>,
242: ): void {
243: 	if (msg.status === "processing") {
244: 		chatState.processing = true;
245: 	}
246: }
247: 
248: export function handleError(
249: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "error" }>,
250: ): void {
251: 	const { code, message } = msg;
252: 
253: 	if (code === "RETRY") {
254: 		// Subtle retry message
255: 		addSystemMessage(message, "info");
256: 	} else {
257: 		// Prominent error
258: 		addSystemMessage(message, "error");
259: 		chatState.processing = false;
260: 		chatState.streaming = false;
261: 	}
262: }
263: 
264: // ─── Actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
265: 
266: /** Add a user message to the chat. */
267: export function addUserMessage(text: string, images?: string[]): void {
268: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
269: 	const msg: UserMessage = { type: "user", uuid, text, images };
270: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, msg];
271: }
272: 
273: /** Add a system message to the chat. */
274: export function addSystemMessage(
275: 	text: string,
276: 	variant: "info" | "error" = "info",
277: ): void {
278: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
279: 	const msg: SystemMessage = { type: "system", uuid, text, variant };
280: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, msg];
281: }
282: 
283: /** Reset all chat state (for stories/tests). Alias for clearMessages. */
284: export const resetChatState = clearMessages;
285: 
286: /**
287:  * Flush any pending debounced assistant render immediately.
288:  * Called after replaying events so mid-stream content is visible.
289:  */
290: export function flushPendingRender(): void {
291: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
292: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
293: 		renderTimer = null;
294: 	}
295: 	flushAssistantRender();
296: }
297: 
298: /** Clear all messages (e.g. on session switch). */
299: export function clearMessages(): void {
300: 	chatState.messages = [];
301: 	chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
302: 	chatState.streaming = false;
303: 	chatState.processing = false;
304: 	toolUuidMap.clear();
305: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
306: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
307: 		renderTimer = null;
308: 	}
309: }
310: 
311: // ─── Part/message removal handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────
312: 
313: export function handlePartRemoved(
314: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "part_removed" }>,
315: ): void {
316: 	const { partId } = msg;
317: 	if (!partId) return;
318: 	chatState.messages = chatState.messages.filter(
319: 		(m) => m.type !== "tool" || (m as ToolMessage).id !== partId,
320: 	);
321: }
322: 
323: export function handleMessageRemoved(
324: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "message_removed" }>,
325: ): void {
326: 	const { messageId } = msg;
327: 	if (!messageId) return;
328: 	chatState.messages = chatState.messages.filter(
329: 		(m) =>
330: 			!("messageId" in m) ||
331: 			(m as AssistantMessage | ToolMessage).messageId !== messageId,
332: 	);
333: }
334: 
335: // ─── Internal helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
336: 
337: /** Flush the current assistant text to the last assistant message's HTML. */
338: function flushAssistantRender(): void {
339: 	if (!chatState.currentAssistantText) return;
340: 
341: 	const html = renderMarkdown(chatState.currentAssistantText);
342: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
343: 
344: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
345: 		const m = messages[i]!;
346: 		if (m.type === "assistant" && !(m as AssistantMessage).finalized) {
347: 			messages[i] = {
348: 				...(m as AssistantMessage),
349: 				rawText: chatState.currentAssistantText,
350: 				html,
351: 			};
352: 			chatState.messages = messages;
353: 			return;
354: 		}
355: 	}
356: }

(End of file - total 356 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── WebSocket Store ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Manages WebSocket connection lifecycle and centralized message dispatch.
3: // Replaces the handler registry pattern from vanilla modules.
4: 
5: import type { ConnectionStatus, RelayMessage, ToolMessage } from "../types.js";
6: import {
7: 	addUserMessage,
8: 	chatState,
9: 	clearMessages,
10: 	flushPendingRender,
11: 	handleDelta,
12: 	handleDone,
13: 	handleError,
14: 	handleMessageRemoved,
15: 	handlePartRemoved,
16: 	handleResult,
17: 	handleStatus,
18: 	handleThinkingDelta,
19: 	handleThinkingStart,
20: 	handleThinkingStop,
21: 	handleToolExecuting,
22: 	handleToolResult,
23: 	handleToolStart,
24: } from "./chat.svelte.js";
25: import {
26: 	handleAgentList,
27: 	handleCommandList,
28: 	handleModelInfo,
29: 	handleModelList,
30: } from "./discovery.svelte.js";
31: import {
32: 	handleAskUser,
33: 	handleAskUserResolved,
34: 	handlePermissionRequest,
35: 	handlePermissionResolved,
36: } from "./permissions.svelte.js";
37: import { handleProjectList } from "./project.svelte.js";
38: import { handleSessionList, handleSessionSwitched } from "./session.svelte.js";
39: import {
40: 	handlePtyCreated,
41: 	handlePtyDeleted,
42: 	handlePtyError,
43: 	handlePtyExited,
44: 	handlePtyList,
45: 	handlePtyOutput,
46: } from "./terminal.svelte.js";
47: import { removeBanner, setClientCount, showBanner } from "./ui.svelte.js";
48: 
49: // ─── Re-exports from extracted modules ──────────────────────────────────────
50: // These were extracted for modularity but consumers still import from here.
51: 
52: export {
53: 	isPushActive,
54: 	setPushActive,
55: 	triggerNotifications,
56: } from "./ws-notifications.js";
57: 
58: import { triggerNotifications } from "./ws-notifications.js";
59: 
60: export {
61: 	fileBrowserListeners,
62: 	fileHistoryListeners,
63: 	historyPageListeners,
64: 	type MessageListener,
65: 	onFileBrowser,
66: 	onFileHistory,
67: 	onHistoryPage,
68: 	onPlanMode,
69: 	onProject,
70: 	onRewind,
71: 	planModeListeners,
72: 	projectListeners,
73: 	rewindListeners,
74: } from "./ws-listeners.js";
75: 
76: import {
77: 	fileBrowserListeners,
78: 	fileHistoryListeners,
79: 	historyPageListeners,
80: 	planModeListeners,
81: 	projectListeners,
82: 	rewindListeners,
83: } from "./ws-listeners.js";
84: 
85: // ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
86: 
87: let _ws: WebSocket | null = null;
88: let _reconnectTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;
89: 
90: const RECONNECT_DELAY_MS = 2000;
91: 
92: export const wsState = $state({
93: 	status: "" as ConnectionStatus,
94: 	statusText: "",
95: });
96: 
97: // ─── Derived getters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
98: 
99: /** Get whether the WebSocket is connected. */
100: export function getIsConnected(): boolean {
101: 	return wsState.status === "connected" || wsState.status === "processing";
102: }
103: 
104: // ─── Core functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
105: 
106: /** Send a JSON message over the WebSocket. */
107: export function wsSend(data: Record<string, unknown>): void {
108: 	if (_ws && _ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
109: 		_ws.send(JSON.stringify(data));
110: 	}
111: }
112: 
113: /** Set connection status with tooltip text. */
114: function setStatus(status: ConnectionStatus, text: string): void {
115: 	wsState.status = status;
116: 	wsState.statusText = text;
117: }
118: 
119: // ─── Connection lifecycle ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
120: 
121: /** Connect callbacks — called after connection established. */
122: let _onConnectFn: (() => void) | null = null;
123: let _onDisconnectFn: (() => void) | null = null;
124: 
125: export function onConnect(fn: () => void): void {
126: 	_onConnectFn = fn;
127: }
128: 
129: export function onDisconnect(fn: () => void): void {
130: 	_onDisconnectFn = fn;
131: }
132: 
133: /** Current slug — stored for auto-reconnect so it reconnects to the right project. */
134: let _currentSlug: string | undefined;
135: 
136: /** Establish WebSocket connection with auto-reconnect. */
137: export function connect(slug?: string): void {
138: 	_currentSlug = slug;
139: 
140: 	if (_ws) {
141: 		// Remove event listeners to prevent the old socket's close handler
142: 		// from interfering with the new connection (race condition fix).
143: 		const oldWs = _ws;
144: 		_ws = null;
145: 		oldWs.close();
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	if (_reconnectTimer) {
149: 		clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
150: 		_reconnectTimer = null;
151: 	}
152: 
153: 	const protocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss:" : "ws:";
154: 	const path = slug ? `/p/${slug}/ws` : "/ws";
155: 	const url = `${protocol}//${window.location.host}${path}`;
156: 
157: 	const ws = new WebSocket(url);
158: 	_ws = ws;
159: 
160: 	ws.addEventListener("open", () => {
161: 		// Guard: only act if this is still the current socket
162: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
163: 		setStatus("connected", "Connected");
164: 		_onConnectFn?.();
165: 	});
166: 
167: 	ws.addEventListener("close", () => {
168: 		// Guard: only act if this is still the current socket.
169: 		// If connect() was called again, _ws points to the new socket
170: 		// and we must not null it or start a reconnect timer.
171: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
172: 
173: 		setStatus("disconnected", "Disconnected");
174: 		_ws = null;
175: 
176: 		// Reset chat streaming/processing state so UI isn't stuck
177: 		chatState.streaming = false;
178: 		chatState.processing = false;
179: 
180: 		_onDisconnectFn?.();
181: 
182: 		// Auto-reconnect (use stored slug so we reconnect to the right project)
183: 		if (_reconnectTimer) clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
184: 		_reconnectTimer = setTimeout(() => {
185: 			_reconnectTimer = null;
186: 			connect(_currentSlug);
187: 		}, RECONNECT_DELAY_MS);
188: 	});
189: 
190: 	ws.addEventListener("error", () => {
191: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
192: 		setStatus("error", "Connection error");
193: 	});
194: 
195: 	ws.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
196: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
197: 		try {
198: 			const msg = JSON.parse(event.data) as RelayMessage;
199: 			handleMessage(msg);
200: 		} catch {
201: 			console.warn("[ws] Failed to parse message:", event.data);
202: 		}
203: 	});
204: }
205: 
206: /** Disconnect and stop reconnecting. */
207: export function disconnect(): void {
208: 	if (_reconnectTimer) {
209: 		clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
210: 		_reconnectTimer = null;
211: 	}
212: 	if (_ws) {
213: 		_ws.close();
214: 		_ws = null;
215: 	}
216: 	setStatus("disconnected", "Disconnected");
217: }
218: 
219: // ─── Centralized message dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────
220: 
221: /**
222:  * Route an incoming WebSocket message to the appropriate store handler.
223:  * Replaces the vanilla handler registry pattern.
224:  */
225: export function handleMessage(msg: RelayMessage): void {
226: 	switch (msg.type) {
227: 		// ─── Chat / Streaming ────────────────────────────────────────────
228: 		case "delta":
229: 			handleDelta(msg);
230: 			break;
231: 		case "thinking_start":
232: 			handleThinkingStart(msg);
233: 			break;
234: 		case "thinking_delta":
235: 			handleThinkingDelta(msg);
236: 			break;
237: 		case "thinking_stop":
238: 			handleThinkingStop(msg);
239: 			break;
240: 		case "tool_start":
241: 			handleToolStart(msg);
242: 			break;
243: 		case "tool_executing":
244: 			handleToolExecuting(msg);
245: 			break;
246: 		case "tool_result":
247: 			handleToolResult(msg);
248: 			break;
249: 		case "tool_content":
250: 			handleToolContentResponse(msg);
251: 			break;
252: 		case "result":
253: 			handleResult(msg);
254: 			break;
255: 		case "done":
256: 			handleDone(msg);
257: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
258: 			break;
259: 		case "status":
260: 			handleStatus(msg);
261: 			break;
262: 		case "error":
263: 			handleChatError(msg);
264: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
265: 			break;
266: 
267: 		// ─── Sessions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
268: 		case "session_list":
269: 			handleSessionList(msg);
270: 			break;
271: 		case "session_switched":
272: 			console.debug(
273: 				`[ws] session_switched id=${msg.id} events=${Array.isArray(msg.events) ? msg.events.length : "none"} history=${msg.history ? "yes" : "no"}`,
274: 			);
275: 			handleSessionSwitched(msg);
276: 			clearMessages();
277: 
278: 			// Reset HistoryView synchronously BEFORE dispatching new data.
279: 			// This replaces the $effect in HistoryView that was racing with
280: 			// handleHistoryPage (the $effect fired in a microtask AFTER data
281: 			// was loaded, wiping it).
282: 			for (const fn of historyPageListeners) {
283: 				fn({ type: "history_reset" });
284: 			}
285: 
286: 			if (msg.events) {
287: 				// Cache hit: replay raw events through existing chat handlers
288: 				// (full fidelity — same code paths as live streaming)
289: 				replayEvents(msg.events);
290: 			} else if (msg.history) {
291: 				// REST API fallback: dispatch structured messages to HistoryView
292: 				for (const fn of historyPageListeners) {
293: 					fn({
294: 						type: "history_page",
295: 						sessionId: msg.id,
296: 						messages: msg.history.messages,
297: 						hasMore: msg.history.hasMore,
298: 						total: msg.history.total,
299: 					});
300: 				}
301: 			}
302: 			break;
303: 
304: 		// ─── Terminal / PTY ──────────────────────────────────────────────
305: 		case "pty_list":
306: 			handlePtyList(msg);
307: 			break;
308: 		case "pty_created":
309: 			handlePtyCreated(msg);
310: 			break;
311: 		case "pty_output":
312: 			handlePtyOutput(msg);
313: 			break;
314: 		case "pty_exited":
315: 			handlePtyExited(msg);
316: 			break;
317: 		case "pty_deleted":
318: 			handlePtyDeleted(msg);
319: 			break;
320: 
321: 		// ─── Discovery ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
322: 		case "agent_list":
323: 			handleAgentList(msg);
324: 			break;
325: 		case "model_list":
326: 			handleModelList(msg);
327: 			break;
328: 		case "model_info":
329: 			handleModelInfo(msg);
330: 			break;
331: 		case "command_list":
332: 			handleCommandList(msg);
333: 			break;
334: 
335: 		// ─── Permissions & Questions ─────────────────────────────────────
336: 		case "permission_request":
337: 			handlePermissionRequest(msg, wsSend);
338: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
339: 			break;
340: 		case "permission_resolved":
341: 			handlePermissionResolved(msg);
342: 			break;
343: 		case "ask_user":
344: 			handleAskUser(msg);
345: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
346: 			break;
347: 		case "ask_user_resolved":
348: 			handleAskUserResolved(msg);
349: 			break;
350: 
351: 		// ─── UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
352: 		case "client_count":
353: 			setClientCount(msg.count ?? 0);
354: 			break;
355: 		case "connection_status":
356: 			handleConnectionStatus(msg);
357: 			break;
358: 		case "banner":
359: 		case "skip_permissions":
360: 		case "update_available":
361: 			handleBannerMessage(msg);
362: 			break;
363: 
364: 		// ─── History ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
365: 		case "history_page":
366: 			// Handled by history component directly (not stored globally)
367: 			for (const fn of historyPageListeners) fn(msg);
368: 			break;
369: 
370: 		// ─── Plan Mode ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
371: 		case "plan_enter":
372: 		case "plan_exit":
373: 		case "plan_content":
374: 		case "plan_approval":
375: 			for (const fn of planModeListeners) fn(msg);
376: 			break;
377: 
378: 		// ─── File Browser ────────────────────────────────────────────────
379: 		case "file_list":
380: 		case "file_content":
381: 			for (const fn of fileBrowserListeners) fn(msg);
382: 			break;
383: 
384: 		// ─── File Changes (routed to both browser and history) ──────────
385: 		case "file_changed":
386: 			for (const fn of fileBrowserListeners) fn(msg);
387: 			for (const fn of fileHistoryListeners) fn(msg);
388: 			break;
389: 		case "file_history_result":
390: 			for (const fn of fileHistoryListeners) fn(msg);
391: 			break;
392: 
393: 		// ─── Rewind ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
394: 		case "rewind_result":
395: 			for (const fn of rewindListeners) fn(msg);
396: 			break;
397: 
398: 		// ─── Project ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
399: 		case "project_list":
400: 			handleProjectList(msg);
401: 			for (const fn of projectListeners) fn(msg);
402: 			break;
403: 
404: 		// ─── Todo ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
405: 		// Todo messages are handled as tool_start/tool_result
406: 		// (the TodoWrite tool result contains JSON parsed by the todo component)
407: 
408: 		// ─── Part / Message removal ──────────────────────────────────────
409: 		case "part_removed":
410: 			handlePartRemoved(msg);
411: 			break;
412: 		case "message_removed":
413: 			handleMessageRemoved(msg);
414: 			break;
415: 
416: 		default:
417: 			// Unknown message type — log for debugging
418: 			// Cast needed: import.meta.env is Vite-specific, not in standard tsconfig
419: 			if ((import.meta as { env?: { DEV?: boolean } }).env?.DEV) {
420: 				console.debug("[ws] Unhandled message type:", msg.type, msg);
421: 			}
422: 			break;
423: 	}
424: }
425: 
426: // ─── Event Replay (session switch with cached events) ────────────────────────
427: // Replays raw events through existing chat handlers — identical code paths
428: // as live streaming. Zero conversion, full fidelity, handles mid-stream.
429: 
430: function replayEvents(events: RelayMessage[]): void {
431: 	chatState.replaying = true;
432: 	for (const event of events) {
433: 		switch (event.type) {
434: 			case "user_message":
435: 				addUserMessage(event.text);
436: 				break;
437: 			case "delta":
438: 				handleDelta(event);
439: 				break;
440: 			case "done":
441: 				handleDone(event);
442: 				break;
443: 			case "tool_start":
444: 				handleToolStart(event);
445: 				break;
446: 			case "tool_executing":
447: 				handleToolExecuting(event);
448: 				break;
449: 			case "tool_result":
450: 				handleToolResult(event);
451: 				break;
452: 			case "result":
453: 				handleResult(event);
454: 				break;
455: 			case "thinking_start":
456: 				handleThinkingStart(event);
457: 				break;
458: 			case "thinking_delta":
459: 				handleThinkingDelta(event);
460: 				break;
461: 			case "thinking_stop":
462: 				handleThinkingStop(event);
463: 				break;
464: 			case "status":
465: 				handleStatus(event);
466: 				break;
467: 			case "error":
468: 				handleError(event);
469: 				break;
470: 			// Skip: session_switched, permission_*, session_list, etc.
471: 			// These are not part of the chat message stream.
472: 		}
473: 	}
474: 	// Flush any pending debounced render (for mid-stream sessions
475: 	// where no "done" event has been received yet)
476: 	flushPendingRender();
477: 	chatState.replaying = false;
478: }
479: 
480: // ─── Tool content handler (full-content fetch for truncated results) ────────
481: 
482: function handleToolContentResponse(
483: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_content" }>,
484: ): void {
485: 	const { toolId, content } = msg;
486: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
487: 	const idx = messages.findIndex(
488: 		(m) => m.type === "tool" && (m as ToolMessage).id === toolId,
489: 	);
490: 	if (idx >= 0) {
491: 		chatState.messages = messages.map((m, i) =>
492: 			i === idx
493: 				? {
494: 						...(m as ToolMessage),
495: 						result: content,
496: 						isTruncated: false,
497: 						fullContentLength: undefined,
498: 					}
499: 				: m,
500: 		);
501: 	}
502: }
503: 
504: // ─── Error handler (needs special routing) ──────────────────────────────────
505: 
506: function handleChatError(msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "error" }>): void {
507: 	const code = msg.code;
508: 
509: 	// PTY-related errors
510: 	if (code === "PTY_CONNECT_FAILED" || code === "HANDLER_ERROR") {
511: 		handlePtyError(msg);
512: 		return;
513: 	}
514: 
515: 	// Chat errors
516: 	handleError(msg);
517: }
518: 
519: // ─── Connection status handler ──────────────────────────────────────────────
520: 
521: const CONNECTION_BANNER_ID = "opencode-connection-status";
522: 
523: function handleConnectionStatus(
524: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "connection_status" }>,
525: ): void {
526: 	if (msg.status === "connected") {
527: 		removeBanner(CONNECTION_BANNER_ID);
528: 	} else {
529: 		const text =
530: 			msg.status === "reconnecting"
531: 				? "Reconnecting to OpenCode…"
532: 				: "OpenCode server disconnected";
533: 		// Remove first so text updates if status changes (e.g. disconnected → reconnecting)
534: 		removeBanner(CONNECTION_BANNER_ID);
535: 		showBanner({
536: 			id: CONNECTION_BANNER_ID,
537: 			variant: "warning",
538: 			icon: "alert-triangle",
539: 			text,
540: 			dismissible: false,
541: 		});
542: 	}
543: }
544: 
545: // ─── Banner handler ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
546: 
547: function handleBannerMessage(msg: RelayMessage): void {
548: 	switch (msg.type) {
549: 		case "update_available":
550: 			showBanner({
551: 				id: "update-available",
552: 				variant: "update",
553: 				icon: "arrow-up-circle",
554: 				text: `Update available: ${msg.version ?? "new version"}`,
555: 				dismissible: true,
556: 				version: msg.version,
557: 			});
558: 			break;
559: 		case "skip_permissions":
560: 			showBanner({
561: 				id: "skip-permissions",
562: 				variant: "skip-permissions",
563: 				icon: "shield-off",
564: 				text: "Permissions are being skipped",
565: 				dismissible: true,
566: 			});
567: 			break;
568: 		case "banner":
569: 			showBanner({
570: 				id: msg.config.id ?? "custom",
571: 				variant:
572: 					(msg.config.variant as
573: 						| "update"
574: 						| "onboarding"
575: 						| "skip-permissions"
576: 						| "warning") ?? "onboarding",
577: 				icon: msg.config.icon ?? "info",
578: 				text: msg.config.text ?? "",
579: 				dismissible: msg.config.dismissible ?? true,
580: 			});
581: 			break;
582: 	}
583: }

<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── Chat Store Tests ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
3: 
4: // Mock DOMPurify (browser-only) before importing the store
5: vi.mock("dompurify", () => ({
6: 	default: {
7: 		sanitize: (html: string) => html,
8: 	},
9: }));
10: 
11: import {
12: 	addSystemMessage,
13: 	addUserMessage,
14: 	chatState,
15: 	clearMessages,
16: 	handleDelta,
17: 	handleDone,
18: 	handleError,
19: 	handleResult,
20: 	handleThinkingDelta,
21: 	handleThinkingStart,
22: 	handleThinkingStop,
23: 	handleToolExecuting,
24: 	handleToolResult,
25: 	handleToolStart,
26: } from "../../src/lib/public/stores/chat.svelte.js";
27: import type {
28: 	AssistantMessage,
29: 	RelayMessage,
30: 	ResultMessage,
31: 	ThinkingMessage,
32: 	ToolMessage,
33: } from "../../src/lib/public/types.js";
34: 
35: // ─── Helper: cast incomplete test data to the expected type ─────────────────
36: // Tests deliberately pass incomplete objects to verify defensive handling.
37: function msg<T extends RelayMessage["type"]>(data: {
38: 	type: T;
39: 	// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: test helper for casting incomplete objects
40: 	[k: string]: any;
41: }): Extract<RelayMessage, { type: T }> {
42: 	return data as Extract<RelayMessage, { type: T }>;
43: }
44: 
45: // ─── Reset state before each test ───────────────────────────────────────────
46: 
47: beforeEach(() => {
48: 	clearMessages();
49: 	vi.useFakeTimers();
50: });
51: 
52: afterEach(() => {
53: 	vi.useRealTimers();
54: });
55: 
56: // ─── handleDelta (streaming text) ───────────────────────────────────────────
57: 
58: describe("handleDelta", () => {
59: 	it("creates an assistant message on first delta", () => {
60: 		handleDelta({ type: "delta", text: "Hello" });
61: 		expect(chatState.messages).toHaveLength(1);
62: 		expect(chatState.messages[0]!.type).toBe("assistant");
63: 		expect(chatState.streaming).toBe(true);
64: 	});
65: 
66: 	it("accumulates text in currentAssistantText", () => {
67: 		handleDelta({ type: "delta", text: "Hello " });
68: 		handleDelta({ type: "delta", text: "world" });
69: 		expect(chatState.currentAssistantText).toBe("Hello world");
70: 	});
71: 
72: 	it("does not create duplicate assistant messages on subsequent deltas", () => {
73: 		handleDelta({ type: "delta", text: "a" });
74: 		handleDelta({ type: "delta", text: "b" });
75: 		const assistantMessages = chatState.messages.filter(
76: 			(m: { type: string }) => m.type === "assistant",
77: 		);
78: 		expect(assistantMessages).toHaveLength(1);
